# CommanderZone

CommanderZone is a web app for playing Magic: The Gathering Commander with friends online.
It focuses on manual Commander tables, deck import, room setup, and table assistant tools.

This file is provided for AI crawler readability. It is not a Google ranking signal or a claim of SEO preference.

## Public SEO pages

- [Home](https://www.commanderzone.com/)
- [Spanish home](https://www.commanderzone.com/es/)
- [Play Commander online](https://www.commanderzone.com/en/play-commander-online/)
- [Jugar Commander online](https://www.commanderzone.com/es/jugar-commander-online/)
- [Play Magic online with friends](https://www.commanderzone.com/en/play-magic-online-with-friends/)
- [Jugar Magic online con amigos](https://www.commanderzone.com/es/jugar-magic-online-con-amigos/)
- [Create a Commander room](https://www.commanderzone.com/en/create-commander-room/)
- [Crear sala Commander](https://www.commanderzone.com/es/crear-sala-commander/)
- [Import a Commander deck](https://www.commanderzone.com/en/import-commander-deck/)
- [Importar mazo Commander](https://www.commanderzone.com/es/importar-mazo-commander/)
- [Commander deck builder](https://www.commanderzone.com/en/commander-deck-builder/)
- [Deck builder Commander](https://www.commanderzone.com/es/deck-builder-commander/)
- [Commander life counter](https://www.commanderzone.com/en/commander-life-counter/)
- [Contador de vidas Commander](https://www.commanderzone.com/es/contador-vidas-commander/)
- [Ways to play Commander online](https://www.commanderzone.com/en/ways-to-play-commander-online/)
- [Formas de jugar Commander online](https://www.commanderzone.com/es/formas-jugar-commander-online/)
- [How to play Commander online](https://www.commanderzone.com/en/how-to-play-commander-online/)
- [Como jugar Commander online](https://www.commanderzone.com/es/como-jugar-commander-online/)
- [SpellTable alternative](https://www.commanderzone.com/en/spelltable-alternative/)
- [Alternativa a SpellTable](https://www.commanderzone.com/es/alternativa-spelltable/)
- [FAQ](https://www.commanderzone.com/en/faq/)
- [FAQ en espanol](https://www.commanderzone.com/es/faq/)

## Localized URLs

CommanderZone publishes localized public SEO pages in 6 SEO locales.
Use the sitemap index for the complete localized URL set:
[Sitemap index](https://www.commanderzone.com/sitemap-index.xml)

## Scope

Private, authenticated, runtime, and debug URLs are intentionally not listed here.
